faq_q1: What is the minimum purchase amount?
faq_a1: You can buy Bitcoin starting from $1 USD or its equivalent in your local currency. No high minimums or restrictions.
faq_q2: How long does it take for my Bitcoin to arrive?
faq_a2: With Lightning Network the transaction is instantaneous (under 5 seconds). Standard on-chain transactions take between 10 and 30 minutes.
faq_q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_a3: We accept Visa and Mastercard credit/debit cards, local bank transfers, cash at authorized locations and Lightning Network payments.
faq_a4: We charge a fixed 1.5% commission per transaction. No hidden fees or monthly maintenance charges.
cta_sub: Join thousands of people who are already saving with Bitcoin.
step_item1_desc: Sign up easily by entering your name, email address, and phone number. The process is quick and simple, designed so you can get started in just a few minutes. Your information will be protected from the very first moment, allowing you to access the platform with complete confidence and security.
step_item2_desc: Access your account at any time using your credentials. Our system incorporates advanced encryption and data protection technologies to safeguard your personal information and funds, providing you with a safe and reliable experience with every login.
step_item3_desc: Enter the amount you want to buy and carefully review the operation details. You can view the real-time price before confirming, allowing you to make informed decisions with complete transparency. The process is simple, intuitive, and designed for all types of users.
step_item4_desc: Complete your purchase in seconds with a single step. Once the operation is confirmed, you will receive your Bitcoin quickly and securely in your account. All transactions are processed efficiently, with clear commissions and no hidden costs.
feat1_desc: The Lightning Network is a second-layer solution that enables instant, low-cost Bitcoin transactions by creating payment channels between users. Transactions that would take minutes or hours on the main Bitcoin network are settled in seconds.
feat2_desc: Know Your Customer (KYC) is our identity verification process. We collect and verify your personal information to prevent fraud, money laundering, and ensure regulatory compliance. Your data is encrypted and protected with bank-level security.
feat3_desc: Flash operates in over 15 countries across Latin America and West Africa, with support for multiple local currencies including XOF, USD, EUR, and more. Our local payment partnerships ensure the best rates and fastest deposits.
feat4_desc: Download our native iOS or Android app to manage your Bitcoin on the go. Receive instant notifications, track your transactions, and securely access your wallet with biometric authentication.
feat_instant_desc_new: Receive your Bitcoin in seconds thanks to the Lightning network. No waiting for confirmations.
feat_secure_desc_new: KYC verification, end-to-end encryption and two-factor authentication included.

feat_mobile_desc_new: Manage your Bitcoin from iOS or Android with a clean, frictionless interface.

feat_fast_desc: Lightning transactions are confirmed in seconds, not hours.

wallets_sub2: Send and receive your sats easily, without complex setup, from the apps you already use.

blog_title: Stacking Sats: How to buy Bitcoin simply from Benin, Togo or Ivory Coast?
blog_subtitle: Learn step by step how to start accumulating Bitcoin with small amounts and without complications in West Africa.
blog_sats_desc: Before talking about how to buy, it's important to understand the basic unit of Bitcoin. A Satoshi (or "Sat") is the smallest unit of Bitcoin. One Bitcoin equals exactly 100 million Satoshis (1 BTC = 100,000,000 sats).
blog_sats_accessible: This means you don't need to buy a whole Bitcoin to get started. You can buy very small fractions, making Bitcoin accessible to everyone, regardless of their purchasing power.
blog_100fcfa: With just 100 FCFA (less than $0.17 USD) you can buy your first Satoshis. No high minimum or barriers to entry.
blog_why_save_intro: In West Africa, where local currencies can lose value rapidly and access to financial services is limited, Bitcoin offers significant advantages:
blog_accessibility_desc: You can start with amounts as small as 100 FCFA. You don't need hundreds of dollars to invest.
blog_tontine_desc: The traditional tontine (community savings box) requires trusting a person or group. With Bitcoin, you control your money directly.
blog_real_ownership_desc: Your Bitcoin is in your wallet, not in a bank. No one can freeze or confiscate it without your consent.
blog_instant_transfers_desc: Sending Bitcoin to family members in another country is fast and cheap, especially with Lightning Network.
blog_warning_text: Bitcoin is volatile. Its price can go up and down significantly. Never invest more than you can afford to lose. This article is only informative, it is not financial advice.
blog_how_to_buy: How to buy Bitcoin in 5 steps
blog_steps_intro: Flash makes buying Bitcoin in West Africa easy. Follow these 5 steps to get started:
blog_step1_desc: A Bitcoin wallet allows you to receive, store and send Bitcoin. For small and frequent purchases, a Lightning wallet is ideal: fast and with minimal fees.
blog_step2_desc: Sign up at bitcoinflash.xyz with your email and phone number. The process takes less than 2 minutes and requires no documents to get started.
blog_step3_desc: Open your Lightning wallet and copy your receiving address (starts with "lnbc..." or similar). This address is unique and will belong to you.
blog_step4_desc: Select the amount you want to buy (from 100 FCFA), enter your Lightning address, and make the payment. You will receive your Bitcoin almost instantly.
blog_step5_desc: When you want to convert your Bitcoin back to FCFA or CFA, you can do it directly on Flash. You can also send Bitcoin to other people.
blog_conclusion_p1: Getting started with Bitcoin has never been easier in West Africa. With Flash, you can buy your first fraction of Bitcoin in minutes and start building your financial future independently.
blog_conclusion_p2: The most important thing is to take the first step. Start small, learn as you go, and discover why millions of people around the world are choosing Bitcoin as a form of savings.
blog_disclaimer_text: This content is purely informational and does not constitute financial advice. Bitcoin investments involve risks. Always consult a financial professional before making investment decisions.
